zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Hales於大約1302年出生在英國艾可哈爾維其時，她的父親Roger de Hales30歲，母親Alice Skogan26歲。她於大約1318年與Thomas of Brotherton 1st Earl of Norfolk結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1326年5月8日在英國英格蘭素可波善姆享年25歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 艾德蒙達斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Hales于大约1302年出生在英国艾可哈爾維其时，她的父亲Roger de Hales30岁，母亲Alice Skogan26岁。她于大约1318年与Thomas of Brotherton 1st Earl of Norfolk结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1326年5月8日在英国英格兰素可波善姆享年25岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 艾德蒙達斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hales
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (widespread, especially in the southeast): from the genitive singular or nominative plural form of Old English halh ‘nook, recess’ (see Hale ).
Irish: when not of English origin, this may be a variant of   Healy   or   McHale  .

variants.name: Hale
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived in a (usually remote) nook or corner of land, from Old English and Middle English hale, dative of h(e)alh ‘nook, hollow’, or a habitational name from a place so named such as Hale in Cheshire, Hampshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, Holme Hale (Norfolk), Hale Street (Kent), and Haile (Cumberland). In northern England the word often has a specialized meaning, denoting a piece of flat alluvial land by the side of a river, typically one deposited in a bend. See Haugh . In southeastern England it often referred to a patch of dry land in a fen. In some cases the surname may be a habitational name from any of several places in England named with this fossilized inflected form, which would originally have been preceded by a preposition, e.g. in the hale or at the hale. This surname is also established in south Wales.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Céile (see McHale ).

variants.name: Hailes
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Hailes in Colinton (Midlothian), originally in East Lothian, named from the Middle English genitive or plural form of hall ‘hall’.
English: variant of   Hales   (see also   Hayles  ).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Hales was born about 1302, in Harwich, Essex, England, her father, Roger de Hales, was 30 and her mother, Alice Skogan, was 26. She married Thomas of Brotherton 1st Earl of Norfolk about 1318. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 8 May 1326, in Bosham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25, and was buried in St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Hales est née environ 1302, à Harwich, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Hales, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Skogan, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas of Brotherton 1st Earl of Norfolk environ 1318. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 mai 1326, à Bosham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterrée à St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Hales è nata il circa 1302 nel Harwich, Essex, England, sua padre, Roger de Hales, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Alice Skogan, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Thomas of Brotherton 1st Earl of Norfolk circa 1318. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ko.Bury St Edmunds, St Edmundsbury Borough,: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 에드먼드'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Hales(이)가 대략 1302년 영국 에세스 하위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Hales(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Skogan(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1318년 Thomas of Brotherton 1st Earl of Norfolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 5월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 보샤에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 에드먼드'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Hales nasceu aproximadamente 1302, em Harwich, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Hales, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice Skogan, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas of Brotherton 1st Earl of Norfolk aproximadamente 1318. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de maio de 1326, em Bosham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 25 anos, e foi sepultada em St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Bury St Edmunds, St Edmundsbury Borough,: ст эдмунд'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Hales родилась около 1302 г. в местности харвич, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Hales было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Skogan, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas of Brotherton 1st Earl of Norfolk около 1318 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 мая 1326 г. в местности бошам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет и была похоронена в местности ст эдмунд'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
